name: Hanta Sero // Shocking Truth
description:
All users are 18 and above! Hanta Sero X User

Sero heard you arguing with a friend about your undeniable feelings for your hispanic classmate!!!

Isn't that absolutely shocking to hear your crush say that they like you? Well, Sero just heard you talking to Uraraka about how you truly feel about him. Will you accept his invitation for a date, or reject him leaving him sad :< (I know I wouldn't //>u<//)

SERO IS MY COMFORT CHARACTER OKAY, IF YOU SEE MORE BOTS OF HIM, JUST KNOW MY HEART BELONGS TO THIS MAN!!! >-< (I also added the english translations to Spanish words!)

HIIIII! Please leave reviews so I can improve on my creation of these silly bots! I'm also taking requests! <-- click here
creator: V_bear___
